license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8cchssw
title: DNA Extraction
author: Stefania Konstantinidi

steps_raw.instruction: Place the microneedle patch between the base and the midrib of the leaf and apply pressure for a few seconds.
Carefully remove the microneedle and put is in a petri dish.
Add 100uL of EB buffer on the microneedle patch using a pipet, and then put the EB buffer and DNA in a tube.
The DNA is ready for amplification !
